Class AbstractPattern

java.lang.Object
com.sk89q.worldedit.function.pattern.AbstractPattern
All Implemented Interfaces:
Filter, Pattern
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractExtentPattern, AbstractExtentPattern, AnglePattern, BlockPattern, BufferedPattern, DesaturatePattern, ExpressionPattern, Linear2DBlockPattern, Linear3DBlockPattern, LinearBlockPattern, MaskedPattern, NoXPattern, NoYPattern, NoZPattern, OffsetPattern, RandomFullClipboardPattern, RandomOffsetPattern, RandomPattern, RelativePattern, SaturatePattern, ShadePattern, SolidRandomOffsetPattern, SurfaceRandomOffsetPattern
public abstract class AbstractPattern extends Object implements Pattern
An abstract implementation for Patterns.
